title: Welcome
text:
This is a Quarto website, hosted in Github, and published to Netlify.
To learn more about Quarto websites visit https://quarto.org/docs/websites.


Code
gg1 = storms |> 
  count(year, name) |> 
  count(year, name = "count") |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = year, y = count)) +
  geom_col() + 
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Number of Tropical Cyclones in North Atlantic")

ggplotly(gg1)
